summary: Iteration 3 - Tested Villen Manager Pro multi-tenant migration. Backend: 19/19 pytest passes covering signup, master admin login, account/settings RBAC, tenant isolation (properties/bookings/dashboard-stats), optional price/deposit, upcoming-checkins ordering, PDF invoice with branding, unlimited Business plan. Frontend: signup form, /settings 5 sections, login signup link, pricing/landing CTAs, optional Preis/Kaution fields with price_note all verified. One frontend bug: after successful signup, browser is redirected to /login instead of /dashboard (auth cookies are set correctly, manual nav to /settings works).

minor.issue: (pre-existing, iteration 2) emergent StripeCheckout returns 'No such checkout.session'. Acceptable per review note.
(pre-existing) Returns JSON array, not CSV - should set text/csv content-type + Content-Disposition for true CSV export.
(pre-existing) Generic 500 on OpenAI failure; should classify (422/502).

ui_bugs.issue: After /api/auth/signup returns 200 and sets cookies, the SPA navigates to /dashboard but ProtectedRoute redirects to /login (likely because AuthContext user state isn't refreshed in time / not calling /api/auth/me after signup). User IS authenticated - visiting /settings or /bookings directly works. Suggested fix: in Signup.jsx after signup success, await auth refresh (e.g. await refreshUser()) before navigate('/dashboard'), OR have AuthContext setUser() from signup response directly.

issues: Date inputs still use browser-native <input type=date> (mm/dd/yyyy) instead of the shadcn Calendar/DatePicker - inconsistent with dark theme. Same issue noted iteration 2 on /availability.

action_items: Fix Signup.jsx post-signup redirect: ensure AuthContext is updated with the new user (from signup response) BEFORE navigate('/dashboard'), otherwise ProtectedRoute sees user=null and bounces to /login.
(optional) Replace browser-native date inputs in booking dialog with shadcn Calendar for consistent dark theme.
(optional) /api/accounting/export should return real CSV (text/csv + Content-Disposition), not JSON array.
critical_code_review_comments: Tenant isolation is correctly enforced via tenant_filter(user) helper on all data endpoints (properties, bookings, accounting, push, availability, stats, upcoming-checkins). Verified end-to-end with 2 fresh tenants - no cross-tenant data leakage.
server.py is now ~1875 lines - strongly recommend splitting into routers (auth/account/booking/accounting/property/subscription/push) before adding more features.
ObjectId conversion in path params still raises 500 on invalid IDs (e.g. PATCH /api/bookings/INVALID) - wrap with try/except → 400.
PDF generation in /api/bookings/{id}/invoice catches all exceptions and returns 500 with str(e) leaking internals - safe error message would be better.
signup endpoint sets cookies but does NOT use the response object same way as login (uses path='/', secure=False - fine for preview, but for production secure=True is required).
AccountSettingsUpdate.company_email uses EmailStr but allows None - PATCH with empty string '' would fail validation; consider 'Optional[EmailStr]' is fine but UI should send null not '' if empty.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_multitenant.py (NEW - 19 tests covering signup, master admin, account, tenant isolation, optional price, upcoming-checkins, PDF invoice, property limits)

success_rate.frontend: 8/9 critical flows verified - only post-signup redirect target is broken

test_credentials: Master admin info@luxusvilla-ferien.de / admin123 confirmed working. Legacy rezeption@hotel.com / rezeption123 and buchhaltung@hotel.com / buchhaltung123 still work (same master account).
seed_data_creation: Each test creates fresh tenant via /api/auth/signup with TEST_ prefixed company names. Master admin temporarily creates TEST_UNL_* properties and cleans them up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_multitenant.py backend/tests/test_subscription_new.py -v`. Master admin email is NOW info@luxusvilla-ferien.de / admin123 (changed from admin@villenmanager.com). All data collections (properties, bookings, accounting, push_subscriptions) are account-scoped via tenant_filter(user). Old /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py uses obsolete admin@hotel.com credentials and WILL FAIL - either delete or update to use info@luxusvilla-ferien.de. Frontend post-signup redirect to /dashboard incorrectly lands on /login - AuthContext likely needs to be primed with the signup response user before navigation.
rca of the issue: Post-signup redirect bug RCA: Signup.jsx calls /api/auth/signup which sets httpOnly access_token+refresh_token cookies and returns user data. It then calls navigate('/dashboard'). ProtectedRoute checks AuthContext.user which is still null (because /api/auth/me hasn't been called yet after signup). Result: user is bounced to /login. Mitigation: (a) AuthContext.signup() should call setUser(response.data) immediately, OR (b) Signup.jsx should await an explicit auth refresh (call /api/auth/me) before navigate. Verified backend cookies ARE set correctly because direct navigation to /settings/bookings works after the bounce.
